revision.comment: new key for [[Category:7th-century religious buildings and structures]]: " +Buddhist temples" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:
This category is about Buddhist temples built in the 7th century. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 07]] [[Category:7th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:7th-century Buddhism|Temp]]
